name: Docker Compose Configuration
description: Create docker-compose.yml and docker-compose.override.yml for web, api, db, and redis services.

name: Linter & Prettier Configuration
description: Create ESLint and Prettier configuration files at root and within workspaces.
notes: ruff (E,F,I,N,B), mypy strict + pydantic.mypy plugin, ESLint flat config. All pass with zero errors after 2026-06-17 fixes.

name: CI/CD Workflows
description: Create GitHub Actions pipelines for linting, testing, and deploying frontend and backend services.
notes: All 4 workflows live and passing. Fixed: lazy DB engine init, ruff line-length violations, mypy pydantic plugin, Render deploy JSON payload format.

name: Render App Configuration
description: Create Render blueprint config for API service deployment. (Originally scoped for Railway — switched to Render per ADR-003.)
notes: Project migrated from Railway to Render. ADR-003 documents the decision. GitHub secrets RENDER_SERVICE_ID and RENDER_TOKEN configured.

name: Local Dev Bootstrap Script
description: Create setup.sh script to bootstrap docker, databases, and dependencies.
notes: Deferred. Docker Compose fully covers local dev setup. setup.sh not created — low priority until cycle 1 onboards external contributors.

name: Next.js Workspace Setup
description: Scaffold apps/web with layout, globals.css, and tsconfig.

name: FastAPI App Skeleton Setup
description: Create apps/api/main.py, config, database, and requirements.txt.
notes: database.py updated 2026-06-17: engine is now lazy-initialized to prevent import-time crash when DATABASE_URL is unset (e.g. in CI).

name: Database Schema Scaffolding
description: Define database models, schemas, and configure Alembic migration environment.
